author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
For Honor: Content Of The Week - June 11
The Hero Skin The Oni's Wrath transforms you into The Oni, the terrifying Killer from the world of Dead by Daylight.

Don't miss the Emote The Oni's Craving, the Execution Bloodcurdling Scream and the Outfit Bloody Rage. Until July 2nd!

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
For Honor: Content Of The Week - June 11
The Hero Skin The Oni's Wrath transforms you into The Oni, the terrifying Killer from the world of Dead by Daylight.

About For Honor:
Step into the battlefield to experience the chaos and glory found only in For Honor. 

Whether battling through a gripping campaign or clashing with others in intense multiplayer modes and PvP modes, players choose from history’s deadliest warriors, each from a fierce rival faction — the bold Knights, the brutal Vikings, the deadly Samurai, the fearsome Wu Lin, and the enigmatic Outlanders. 

For Honor is a fast-paced and immersive experience that continues to evolve with major gameplay updates, new Heroes, thrilling events, and more, keeping the conflict alive and ever challenging.

#Ubisoft #ForHonor 

Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
For Honor: Warrior’s Den Y10S2 TU1 REVEAL LIVESTREAM June 10 2026
"Tune-in to the Warrior’s Den For Honor: Y10S2 TU1 Reveal Livestream as we give you all the details on the Seasonal Event, Battle Pass, Legacy Pass, New Hero Skin, Armor Variations, E-sports, Balancing and more LIVE!"

SEGMENT TIME STAMPS:

00:00 Y10S2 UNLEASHED COUNTDOWN
09:40 Y10S2 UNLEASHED INTRO
12:11 Y10S2 UNLEASHED STORY TRAILER
13:40 Y10S2 UNLEASHED NARRATIVE
20:45 Y10S2 UNLEASHED GAMEPLAY TRAILER
23:25 Y10S2 UNLEASHED DETAILS W/ ERIC POPE
38:10 SURVIVORS OF THE FOG GAME MODE
44:50 Y10S2 UNLEASHED COSMETICS
52:50 Y10S2 BATTLE PASS WEAPONS VIDEO
55:45 BALANCING
1:12:45 Y10S2 LEGACY PASS WEAPONS VIDEO
1:15:00 E-SPORTS
1:23:05 Y10S2 TU1 VIKING ARMOR VARIATIONS VIDEO
1:24:50 COMMUNITY CORNER
1:36:00 OUTRO & THANKS

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
For Honor: Year 10 Season 2 - Unleashed Gameplay Trailer
Don't hold back. Y10S2: Unleashed starts June 11, 2026. 

The Oni's Wrath Hero Skin for Sohei, Oni's Hunt Hero Skin Bundle, and Oni's Hunt Deluxe Hero Skin Bundle will all be available June 11, 2026.
